title: COVID-19: Disruptive Tech and SME Innovation Can Boost the Fight Against the Virus

summary.about: How AI, machine learning, blockchain and small-business innovation can support pandemic response.
summary.audience: Technology entrepreneurs, health agencies, investors and innovation policymakers.
summary.method: Reviews documented applications in genome analysis, drug discovery, diagnostics, tracing and medical supply chains.
summary.insights: Disruptive technology can speed research, diagnosis and traceability while creating practical opportunities for Indian SMEs.
